Checks that setScriptSource works for editing the top-most stack frame
Paused at (before live edit):
function testExpression(a, b) {
  #debugger;
  return a + b;

Paused at (after live edit 1):
function testExpression(a, b) {
  #return a * b;
}

Nested result 1: 15
Paused at (after live edit 2):
function testExpression(a, b, c, d, e, f, g, h) {
  #return a * b + String(h).length;  // +"undefined".length
}

Nested result 2: 24
Paused at (after live edit 3):
function testExpression(a, b) {
  #return a * b + 3;
}

Nested result 3: 18
Result:
{
    description : 18
    type : number
    value : 18
}
